auth.invalid_password: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.invalid_username: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.terms_agree: I agree to Terms & Privacy Policy
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to use your profile and saved data.
auth.register_subtitle: Create an account with email, username, and password.

home.title: Home
home.telegram_promo_subtitle: Get updates, new features, and content notifications.

player.subtitle_sync_desc: Shift timing to match the audio
player.subtitle_sync_help: Subtitles too early? Increase (+). Too late? Decrease (−).
player.wyzie_key_hint: Claim a free Wyzie key at store.wyzie.io/redeem, then paste it here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.guest_subtitle: Login to keep favorites and watch history synced.
profile.logout_confirm: Do you want to sign out of your account?
profile.signin_account_subtitle: Sign in to save your favorites and watch history.
profile.sign_out_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.try_select_all: Try selecting "All" to see every provider
profile.support_body_expired: The server has expired and content can no longer be loaded. Your support can help bring it back online.
profile.support_body: Sozo relies on a server that needs periodic renewal. If you enjoy using the app, your support helps keep everything running smoothly.
profile.native_window_bar_subtitle: Use Windows' standard title bar instead of the app's custom one.

search.title: Search
search.sources_hint: Search several sources at once. Leave empty to use your current provider.

errors.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

app_lock.choose_length_subtitle: Pick how many digits your PIN will have.
app_lock.create_pin_subtitle: Pick something you won't share with anyone.
app_lock.confirm_pin_subtitle: Enter your new PIN once more.
app_lock.biometric_unavailable: Biometrics are not available on this device
app_lock.disable_subtitle: Your PIN and biometric preference will be removed.
app_lock.enabled_hint: You'll be asked for your PIN when the app starts.
app_lock.disabled_hint: App lock is off. Turn it on to protect what you watch.
app_lock.private_setup_required: Set up a PIN first to use the private list
app_lock.private_long_press_hint: Long-press to move to your Private list — hidden behind your PIN, and its watch history isn't saved.
app_lock.private_always_ask: Always ask PIN for private list
app_lock.private_always_ask_hint: Re-enter your PIN every time, not just once per session
app_lock.reset_body: This removes the PIN and unlocks Sozo on this computer. Your library and history stay. You can set a new PIN later in Profile → App Lock.

my_list.empty_subtitle: Tap the + button on any title to save it here.
my_list.unauth_title: Sign in to view your list
my_list.unauth_subtitle: Your saved titles will appear here once you sign in.

deeplink.opt_in_title: Open Sozo links in this app?
deeplink.opt_in_body_android: Shared sozo.azamov.me links will open directly inside Sozo. Enable "Open supported links" in your system settings.
deeplink.opt_in_body_ios: Sozo links open in the app automatically. If a link opens in Safari, long-press it and choose "Open in Sozo".

streak.empty_subtitle: Watch one episode today to begin your daily streak.
streak.locked_today: Today's locked in. Come back tomorrow!
streak.keep_going: Keep your streak alive — don't forget to watch today.
streak.risk_subtitle: Your streak resets at midnight. Watch something now to save it.
streak.milestone_subtitle: Incredible consistency. Keep showing up and set a new personal best.
streak.freeze_saved_subtitle: A freeze covered your missed day — your streak lives on.
streak.freeze_awarded_subtitle: Freezes protect your streak when you miss a single day.

watch_party.title: Watch Party
watch_party.lobby_waiting_host: Waiting for the host to start…
watch_party.only_host_controls: Only the host can control playback
watch_party.room_closed_empty: The party closed because everyone left
watch_party.resolve_failed: Couldn't load this title on your device
watch_party.plugin_required_body: Install the required source plugin to watch this together.
watch_party.error_not_found: Party not found or already closed
watch_party.error_forbidden: You don't have access to this party
watch_party.error_unauthorized: Please sign in to join a watch party

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_subtitle: When something new arrives, you'll see it here.

manga.sources_desc: Add manga extension repositories to install extra manga, manhwa and webtoon providers. They run on your device (Android only).
manga.installing_long: Installing extensions… this can take a moment for large repos.
manga.no_extensions: No extensions found at that URL.
manga.android_only: This feature is only available on Android
manga.no_preferences: This source has no configurable settings

cloudflare.title: Verify you're human
cloudflare.hint: Complete the check below — this closes automatically when done.

desktop.saved_refresh_on_pc: Saved — tap "Refresh sources" on the PC to update it.
desktop.saved_loading_sources: Saved — loading sources from your phone…
desktop.let_pc_use_sources: Let the Sozo PC app use this phone’s sources.
desktop.no_wifi_address: Turned on, but no Wi‑Fi address was found. Connect this phone to Wi‑Fi (not mobile data), then reopen this screen.
desktop.step_host_same_wifi: Keep this phone and your PC on the same Wi‑Fi network.
desktop.step_host_pick_sources: Pick which sources to share (or leave “Share all” on).
desktop.step_host_paste_on_pc: On the PC, open Sozo → Profile → Desktop sources and paste the link.
desktop.step_host_keep_open: Keep Sozo open on this phone while you browse on the PC.
desktop.every_source_shared: Every source on this phone is shared
desktop.no_sources_yet: No sources on this phone yet. Add some in Profile → CloudStream / Aniyomi / Manga Sources, then reload here.
desktop.step_client_same_wifi: Keep this PC and your phone on the same Wi‑Fi network.
desktop.step_client_open_on_phone: On the phone, open Sozo → Profile → Share sources to desktop and turn it on.
desktop.step_client_choose_sources: On the phone, choose which sources to share (or leave “Share all” on).
desktop.step_client_copy_link: Copy the link shown there, paste it above, then tap Save.
desktop.step_client_refresh: Changed the shared sources on the phone? Tap "Refresh sources" here.
desktop.step_client_keep_open: Keep Sozo open on the phone while you browse here.
desktop.step_client_emulator: Using an Android emulator? Its IP isn’t reachable directly — run "adb forward tcp:8765 tcp:8765" on this PC, then paste http://127.0.0.1:8765 above (still turn the switch on in the emulator).
desktop.how_it_works_desc: Use your CloudStream, Aniyomi & manga sources on the Sozo desktop app. The phone runs the sources; the PC just views them.
desktop.offline_watch_downloads: You can keep watching downloaded videos while the connection is offline.

shorts.empty_subtitle: Short clips will appear here once they are available.

comments.empty_subtitle: Be the first to share your thoughts
comments.sign_in_prompt: Sign in to leave a comment

history.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear your watch history?
history.empty_subtitle: Start watching to see your history here

main.shorts_refresh_body: Double-click on the Shorts tab. The feed is refreshed and new videos are uploaded.

ios.how_it_works_desc: Use your CloudStream, Aniyomi & manga sources in Sozo for iOS. Your Android phone runs the sources; this device just views them.
ios.step_client_same_wifi: Keep this device and your Android phone on the same Wi‑Fi network.
